title: matelea haberi
intro: Matelea haberi, also known as the "Milk Vine," is a tropical plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Matelea haberi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making tea or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
